Product: Odoo
When creating and sending out a contract, the default status of the contract is New.
Once there is a minimum of one completed signature on the document, the status changes to Partially Signed.
After all required parties have signed the contract, the status changes to Fully Signed.
the status changes automatically as the document is signed.
Internal users, such as HR and recruitment employees, are alerted in the database when there is a signature requested of them.

To view all contract templates, navigate to Payroll app --> Configuration --> Templates.
